Description: Batch operations tren nhieu families dung script compose. Cho tasks can apply cung logic cho nhieu .rfa files.

Use_When: task can apply cung operation cho > 3 families
operation giong nhau cho tat ca families (batch set shared, batch rename, batch update geometry)
co script san trong catalog cho operation nay
bridge tools khong co batch family mode
Dont_Use_When: chi can lam 1-2 families — dung bridge tools tung cai
moi family can logic khac nhau — dung individual playbooks
task don gian: add parameter, create type — bridge tools du
DecisionGate.Prefer_Over: Lap di lap lai bridge tools cho tung family — script batch nhanh hon va consistent hon.

Steps.Purpose: Lay danh sach family files can process tu library roots.
Tim script phu hop trong catalog cho batch operation.
Validate script truoc khi batch run.
Chay dry-run tren 1 family dau tien de verify ket qua.
Chay script tren tat ca families voi atomicTransaction = false (moi family doc lap).

Params.hint: atomicTransaction = false (moi family save rieng), steps = 1 per family

Steps.Purpose: Spot-check 2-3 families de verify ket qua.

QcStep.ExpectedOutcome: All families processed, no failures in compose run.
